_meta.source: typewise.app/customer-stories + public PR, re-verified line by line on 2026-06-12
_meta.warning: Customer names are public (typewise.app/customers). Use-case summaries follow the published customer stories; entries marked 'not publicly documented' have no published story and must be validated in discovery before quoting any detail.

case_studies.headline: Swiss multilingual retailer speeds up service responses with AI agent assist
case_studies.use_case_summary: Brack.ch agents use Typewise as an agent-assist layer (browser extension): sentence suggestions accepted with Tab, personalized snippets, multilingual support. The published story stresses that complex requests still need human agents — this is assist, not autonomous resolution.

case_studies.headline: DPD Switzerland reports ~30% efficiency boost on email responses
case_studies.use_case_summary: DPD Switzerland (customer since 2023) uses Typewise text prediction for customer-service email: sentence completion, templates, autocorrection and language detection across de/fr/it/en, with a reported 20-30% time saving per response.

case_studies.headline: Fortune 500 CPG listed among Typewise enterprise customers
case_studies.use_case_summary: Unilever is a publicly named Typewise customer. Deployment specifics (channels, brands, languages) are not publicly documented — validate in discovery before quoting details.

case_studies.headline: IVECO accelerates breakdown assistance at its Customer Uptime Center
case_studies.use_case_summary: IVECO's Customer Uptime Center (Turin) uses Typewise for breakdown assistance: real-time translation across 10 languages, snippets, and suggestions that recognize product terminology and codes — reported ~25% reduction in manual drafting.

case_studies.headline: Consumer-health device maker listed among Typewise customers
case_studies.use_case_summary: Beurer is a publicly named Typewise customer (consumer health devices, DACH). Deployment specifics are not publicly documented — validate in discovery.

case_studies.headline: Swiss freight operator lifts service efficiency with AI Communication Assistant
case_studies.use_case_summary: Planzer uses Typewise's AI Communication Assistant for customer service across en/de/fr/it: personalized snippets and response assistance, with a reported ~17% efficiency gain.
